creator: avonarx@gmx.net
text:
Currently installing php70-pdo-pgsql requires postgresql93-client.  

PostgreSQL93 is 3 years old. Current version is postgreSQL95

# pkg install php70-pdo_pgsql

Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
The following 3 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):
New packages to be INSTALLED:
        php70-pdo_pgsql: 7.0.5
        postgresql93-client: 9.3.12
        php70-pdo: 7.0.5
The process will require 9 MiB more space.
2 MiB to be downloaded.
Proceed with this action? [y/N]: N
